metadata.notes: Generated by Protocol Intelligence Platform. SR- IDs are placeholders.

general_information.notes: To be completed by Risk Manager upon IRMS entry

study_overview.title: TACTIVE-U: An Interventional Safety and Efficacy Phase 1b/2, Open-Label Umbrella Study to Investigate Tolerability, PK, and Antitumor Activity of Vepdegestrant (ARV-471/PF-07850327), an Oral Proteolysis Targeting Chimera, in Combination With Other Anticancer Treatments in Participants Aged 18 Years and Over With ER+ Advanced or Metastatic Breast Cancer, Sub-Study A (ARV-471 in Combination With Abemaciclib)

critical_factors.critical_data: Dose-Limiting Toxicities (DLTs) data; Objective Response Rate (ORR), Duration of Response (DoR), Clinical Benefit Rate (CBR), and Progression-Free Survival (PFS) data; Patient-Reported Outcomes (EORTC-QLQ-C30, EQ-5D-5L)
critical_factors.critical_process: Investigator assessment of tumor response per RECIST v1.1; Timely and accurate completion of ePRO questionnaires by participants

critical_process.signal: Confirmed CR or PR per RECIST v1.1 by investigator assessment

critical_factors.critical_data: AE/SAE data including type, frequency, intensity, and timing; Laboratory test abnormalities; DLT observation data during Cycle 1
critical_factors.critical_process: Grading of adverse events and laboratory abnormalities per NCI CTCAE v5.0; Timely reporting of DLTs to inform recommended Phase 2 dose (RP2D) selection

critical_factors.factor_name: Data Integrity and Reliability of Trial Results
critical_factors.critical_data: Pharmacokinetic (PK) plasma concentrations (ARV-471, ARV-473, abemaciclib, M2, M18, M20); ctDNA and biomarker data; Concomitant medication data
critical_factors.critical_process: Accurate timing of PK sampling relative to dosing, especially during the 7-day abemaciclib lead-in; Handling, processing, and shipment of PK, ctDNA, and tumor tissue samples

critical_factors.critical_data: Prior anticancer therapy history (lines of chemo, endocrine, and CDK4/6 inhibitors); Histological diagnosis data (ER+/HER2-); Organ function laboratory values (hepatic, renal, hematologic)
critical_factors.critical_process: Verification of exactly 1 prior CDK4/6 inhibitor line and no prior experimental endocrine therapies; Confirmation of adequate washout periods for prior therapies and prohibited medications

critical_data.signal: Exclusion 12, 13, 18 — Hepatic, hematologic, and renal impairment

critical_process.signal: Exclusion 7 — Washout periods for prior procedures and treatment

critical_factors.critical_data: Dosing data for ARV-471 (QD) and abemaciclib (BID); Dose modification and interruption data
critical_factors.critical_process: Management of the 7-day abemaciclib PK lead-in dosing schedule; IP accountability and ensuring correct dose levels are administered during 28-day cycles

critical_data.signal: ARV-471 200 mg QD, abemaciclib 150 mg BID

risks.risk_description: Enrolled participant(s) do not meet protocol eligibility criteria, specifically regarding the complex prior therapy requirements and strict organ function cutoffs.
risks.additional_context: The protocol requires exactly 1 prior line of a CDK4/6 inhibitor, ≤1 prior chemotherapy, and ≤2 prior endocrine therapies. It also has strict exclusion criteria for hepatic dysfunction, hematologic abnormalities, and renal impairment (eGFR <45 mL/min).

associated_causes.cause: Misinterpretation or incomplete documentation of prior lines of therapy for advanced/metastatic disease.

usdm_trigger.signal: Inclusion 3: At least 1 and no more than 2 lines of prior therapies

associated_causes.cause: Errors in calculating eGFR or misinterpreting local lab values against protocol-specific hepatic and hematologic thresholds.

usdm_trigger.signal: Exclusion 12, 13, 18: Hepatic, hematologic, and renal impairment criteria

controls.control_description: Programmed edit checks in the EDC to flag out-of-range screening laboratory values and incompatible prior therapy entries.
controls.additional_context: Focus on eGFR calculation and prior CDK4/6 inhibitor history.

controls.control_description: Medical monitor review of screening data for all participants prior to enrollment to confirm prior therapy lines and eligibility.
controls.additional_context: Required due to the complexity of the prior treatment inclusion criteria.

intelligence.notes: The protocol requires exactly 1 prior line of a CDK4/6 inhibitor, ≤1 prior chemotherapy, and ≤2 prior endocrine therapies. It also has strict exclusion criteria for hepatic dysfunction, hematologic ab

risks.risk_description: Participant takes prohibited concomitant medication(s), specifically strong/moderate CYP3A inhibitors or inducers, or QT-prolonging drugs.
risks.additional_context: Because ARV-471 and abemaciclib are subject to CYP3A-mediated metabolism, the protocol strictly prohibits concurrent administration of strong/moderate CYP3A inhibitors/inducers, requiring specific washout periods prior to enrollment.

associated_causes.cause: Participants inadvertently taking over-the-counter herbal supplements or foods that act as CYP3A inducers/inhibitors.

usdm_trigger.signal: Exclusion 17: Concurrent administration of medications, food, or herb supplements

associated_causes.cause: Investigators prescribing prohibited QT-prolonging medications to manage emergent symptoms.

usdm_trigger.signal: Exclusion 17: drugs known to predispose to Torsade de Pointes

critical_factors_linked: Data Integrity and Reliability of Trial Results

controls.control_description: Routine review of concomitant medication logs against the prohibited medications list during site monitoring visits.
controls.additional_context: CRAs to specifically check for CYP3A inhibitors/inducers and QT-prolonging agents.

intelligence.notes: Because ARV-471 and abemaciclib are subject to CYP3A-mediated metabolism, the protocol strictly prohibits concurrent administration of strong/moderate CYP3A inhibitors/inducers, requiring specific was

risks.risk_description: Samples incorrectly obtained, analyzed, stored or handled, particularly concerning the extensive PK and biomarker sampling required for this combination therapy.
risks.additional_context: The study involves complex PK sampling for ARV-471, abemaciclib, and three active metabolites (M2, M18, M20), including a 7-day PK lead-in period, as well as ctDNA and tumor tissue collection.

associated_causes.cause: Site staff missing critical PK timepoints or incorrectly recording dosing times relative to sample collection.
Improper processing, freezing, or shipping of sensitive ctDNA or biomarker samples.

critical_factors_linked: Data Integrity and Reliability of Trial Results

usdm_drivers.signal: Evaluate plasma exposure of ARV-471, ARV-473, abemaciclib and metabolites

controls.control_description: Provide detailed, protocol-specific laboratory manuals and quick-reference guides for PK and biomarker sample collection, processing, and shipping.
controls.additional_context: Emphasis on the 7-day PK lead-in requirements.

controls.control_description: CRAs to perform regular reconciliation of PK sampling times against dosing records to ensure accuracy.

intelligence.notes: The study involves complex PK sampling for ARV-471, abemaciclib, and three active metabolites (M2, M18, M20), including a 7-day PK lead-in period, as well as ctDNA and tumor tissue collection.

risks.risk_description: Lack of appropriate or timely adverse event/serious adverse event (SAE) management, particularly regarding the identification and reporting of Dose-Limiting Toxicities (DLTs).
risks.additional_context: As a Phase 1b/2 study evaluating a novel combination, accurate and timely reporting of DLTs during the Cycle 1 observation period is critical for safety and for selecting the Recommended Phase 2 Dose (RP2D).

associated_causes.cause: Failure of site staff to properly grade toxicities according to NCI CTCAE v5.0.

usdm_trigger.signal: EP_SC_01_AEs: graded by NCI CTCAE v5.0

associated_causes.cause: Delayed reporting of DLTs by the investigator, impacting dose escalation/de-escalation decisions.

usdm_drivers.signal: Assess safety and tolerability to select RP2D

controls.control_description: Targeted training for investigators on DLT definitions, the Cycle 1 observation period, and expedited reporting requirements.
Frequent medical monitor review of safety data and laboratory results during Phase 1b to rapidly identify potential DLTs.

intelligence.notes: As a Phase 1b/2 study evaluating a novel combination, accurate and timely reporting of DLTs during the Cycle 1 observation period is critical for safety and for selecting the Recommended Phase 2 Dose
